parameters.query:
SELECT r.id, r.firm_id, r.reviewer_name, r.rating, r.review_text, r.created_at,
  f.name as firm_name,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - r.created_at)) / 3600 as hours_waiting
FROM reviews r
JOIN firms f ON f.id = r.firm_id
WHERE r.status = 'pending'
  AND r.ai_response IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY r.created_at ASC

INSERT INTO notifications (firm_id, type, message, review_id, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.firm_id }}',
  'unanswered_review',
  '{{ $json.message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.review_id }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
